label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out how a typical person would answer this question about causation. So, the question is: Jen sees some puppies playing next to her driveway again and wants to kill them. She decides to go to the hardware store to buy some rat poison that she thinks will work on the puppies. As she pulls out of her garage, the wheel slips in her hand and she drives off to the side of the driveway. All the puppies are crushed and killed under the car. With the puppies eliminated, Jen doesn't need to go to the hardware store. Did Jen intentionally kill the puppies? Possible
